When to use:

Configure and fix Vue frontend CI quality gates. Use when setting up or repairing npm lint, format check, vue-tsc typecheck, Vitest with coverage thresholds, Husky pre-commit hooks, or CI failures on eslint-plugin-vue, Prettier, or test scripts.
